header_title.description: App name shown in the header. A recipe discovery app for world cuisines.

header_subtitle.description: Tagline shown below the app name in the header.

home_page_hero_title.description: Main heading on the home page hero section.

home_page_hero_subtitle.text: Tala omapito gawayelelwe kuulilo yomulilo gwoshilongo
home_page_hero_subtitle.description: Subtitle text displayed under the hero heading on the home page.

home_page_featured_title.description: Section heading displayed above the recipe card grid.

recipe_card_cooking_time.description: Cooking time label on a recipe card. {minutes} is replaced with the number of minutes.

recipe_card_difficulty.description: Label displayed before the difficulty level on a recipe card.

recipe_card_easy.description: Difficulty level label indicating an easy recipe.

recipe_card_medium.description: Difficulty level label indicating a moderately difficult recipe.

recipe_card_hard.description: Difficulty level label indicating a difficult recipe.

recipe_card_ramen_description.text: Ombi yomutwe gwomahungu gopangela ogali na chashu oshowo, omukate ogukwatala, noonoka yiilonga.

recipe_card_margherita_description.text: Pizza yoye ya Neapolitan na San Marzano tomatoes, mozzarella oshowo, no basil.

recipe_card_tacos_name.description: Enele lyomadhilo gookutuka Tacos al Pastor.

recipe_card_tacos_description.text: Tacos yomahungu gopangela ge na pineapple, cilantro, no onion omacorn tortillas.
recipe_card_tacos_description.description: Ombi yomadhilo gookutuka Tacos al Pastor.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.text: Omuya ogupitilwe na creamy tomato no butter sauce na omakungu ga aromatiki.

recipe_card_pad_thai_description.text: Omakate ga rice noodles gokulya na shrimp, tofu, peanuts no tamarind sauce.

recipe_card_crepes_description.text: Crepes omandi, ogali na Nutella, fresh strawberries, no whipped cream.
